programDescription: 16-week hybrid training plan for the Ham & Lyme First 50K trail ultra (19 Sep 2026), target finish 4:20. Polarised easy running volume, threshold work, course-specific hill and treadmill-incline sessions, and progressive long runs peaking at 4h30. Two strength sessions and two CrossFit-style conditioning sessions per week, with eccentric loading for descent resilience on the 1,052m of elevation gain.
